rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. RAY K. SHAHANI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Set Aside Judgment And Withdraw Writ Of Possession
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 1, 2014, line 6. -DEFENDANT RAY SHAHANI'S Motion Set Aside Judgment And Withdraw Writ Of Possession. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Judgment and Withdraw Writ of Possession. Hearing required to address why defendant did not attempt to comply with the Court order regarding filing of Motion to Stay, i.e. to address (1) "Defendant ¿ shall file and serve all moving papers in support of his motion to stay prosecution of this case by 4 p.m. on March 7, 2014." (unfiled Order dated March 7, 2014 1:25-27) and (2) "the undersigned [William Caspari] believed that he was supposed to file the order with the clerk offices downstairs, and planned to do so when he filed the motion that was also the subject of the same order." (Points and Authorities 4:8-11). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VALERIE LEE VS. MICHAEL W. SPENCER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 1, 2014, line 8. -DEFENDANT MICHAEL SPENCER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment is GRANTED, subject to opposition.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MANFRED ANGSTENBERGER VS. ROBERT S. WILSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Summons And Service Of First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 1, 2014, line 7. -DEFENDANT ROBERT WILSON'S Motion To Quash Summons And Service Of First Amended Complaint. Defendant's Motion to Quash Summons and Service of First Amended Complaint is DENIED. Uncertainty caused by missing attachment in the complaint was resolved by filing First Amended Complaint. First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to support a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Defendant does not cite any authority for the proposition that new summons had to be issued. = (501/REQ)
